package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerResourcePoolingDbPoolCreatedPerRepository() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_db_pool_created_per_repository"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Resource pooling. Flag database pools constructed per repository instance instead of shared process ownership."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
